name: hgrader_mac
description: Desktop Electron port of HomeworkGrader for macOS and future cross-platform targets.

scripts.test: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check renderer.js && node --check src/openai-service.js && node --check src/exporters.js && node --check src/shared.js && node --check src/canvas-connect.js
